data.title: WhiteHawk Limited to Host Virtual General Meeting
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An announcement from WhiteHawk Ltd. ( (AU:WHK) ) is now available.

WhiteHawk Limited announced it will hold its General Meeting virtually on 11 February 2025. The company emphasizes the ease of participation through online registration, enabling shareholders to vote and pose questions in real-time. This move reflects WhiteHawk’s commitment to leveraging technology for shareholder engagement, likely improving accessibility and participation.

More about WhiteHawk Ltd.

WhiteHawk Limited, founded in 2018, is a pioneer in cloud-based AI/ML cyber risk solutions. It offers a comprehensive online cybersecurity exchange, allowing organizations to manage digital risks and enhance cybersecurity measures efficiently and cost-effectively. Their product offerings include Cyber Risk Programs and Radars, as well as virtual consultations, catering to varied client needs.

data.title: Wellard Limited Requests Trading Halt Amid Potential Asset Sale
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Wellard Ltd. ( (AU:WLD) ) has provided an update.

Wellard Limited, a company listed on the ASX, has requested a trading halt for its securities pending the release of an announcement regarding a potential asset sale. This trading halt is to allow Wellard to manage its continuous disclosure obligations and will remain in effect until the announcement is released or until the commencement of normal trading on 14 January 2025.

data.title: Standard Uranium Receives Extension for Private Placement Completion
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Standard Uranium ( (TSE:STND) ) has issued an announcement.

Standard Uranium announced an extension granted by the TSX Venture Exchange to complete the final tranche of its non-brokered private placement, now due by February 6, 2025. This offering involves the sale of NFT and FT Units, with the proceeds likely supporting the company’s ongoing exploration and development initiatives in the uranium-rich Athabasca Basin, potentially enhancing its market position and future project developments.

More about Standard Uranium

Standard Uranium is a uranium exploration company focused on discovering and developing uranium projects in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan, Canada. It holds interests in over 233,455 acres in this region, known for its rich uranium resources. The company has initiated three joint venture partnerships with significant work commitments to advance its exploration projects.

data.title: GA Technologies Expands ITANDI BB with New Advanced Options for Real Estate Agents
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

GA technologies Co., Ltd. ( (JP:3491) ) has provided an update.

GA technologies Co., Ltd. announced that its subsidiary ITANDI Inc. will launch Additional Advanced Options for its ITANDI BB real estate agent site in the coming spring. These new features, which will be available for a fee, are designed to improve operational efficiency for real estate agents by offering functionalities like a Customized Search Function and Floor Plan Modification. ITANDI BB, which has been widely adopted with a high usage rate among brokerage firms, aims to further solidify its position as a key tool in the real estate industry. The introduction of these advanced options reflects ITANDI’s commitment to evolving as an infrastructure company that supports the real estate sector with high-utility technological services.

More about GA technologies Co., Ltd.

GA technologies Co., Ltd. operates in the real estate technology industry, primarily focusing on facilitating real estate transactions through its subsidiary ITANDI Inc. ITANDI offers services like ITANDI BB, a real-time website for real estate agents that enhances transaction efficiency and reduces vacancy risks, and ITANDI BB+, a suite of digital services for rental operations.

data.title: Manulife US REIT Reports 9.3% Decline in Portfolio Valuation Amid Strategic Adjustments
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Manulife US REIT ( (SG:BTOU) ) has shared an announcement.

Manulife US REIT has reported a 9.3% year-over-year decline in its portfolio valuation, amounting to a decrease of US$116.6 million, as of December 31, 2024. Despite this, the company is actively engaging in strategic capital and asset management, including divestment discussions and a planned repayment of US$200 million to lenders by 2025, aiming to meet its Net Proceeds Target and enhance portfolio resilience.

More about Manulife US REIT

Manulife US Real Estate Investment Trust (Manulife US REIT) is a real estate investment trust established under Singaporean law, focusing on owning and managing commercial real estate properties in the United States.

data.title: Proxy Advisory Firms Support Orla Mining’s Acquisition Plan
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Orla Mining ( (TSE:OLA) ) has shared an announcement.

Orla Mining Ltd. has received recommendations from leading independent proxy advisory firms for its shareholders to vote in favor of acquiring the Musselwhite Mine from Newmont Corporation. The acquisition is coupled with a private placement of convertible notes and share purchase warrants, which will partially finance the purchase and is endorsed by Orla’s Board of Directors.

More about Orla Mining

Orla Mining Ltd. is a company focused on acquiring, developing, and operating mineral properties to enhance stakeholder value. Its prominent projects include the Camino Rojo in Zacatecas State, Mexico, and South Railroad.

data.title: Standard Chartered Continues Share Buy-Back Program
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has issued an update.

Standard Chartered PLC announced the purchase of 529,154 of its ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buy-back program. The shares were bought at prices ranging from 1,000.50 to 1,017.00 GB pence, with a volume-weighted average price of 1,010.47 GB pence. This move aligns with the company’s strategy to manage its capital and share capital structure effectively. Following the cancellation of these shares, the total number of ordinary shares in issue will be 2,422,304,903, maintaining the same number of voting rights. The share buy-back program signifies Standard Chartered’s efforts to enhance shareholder value and optimize its financial resources.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a leading banking and financial services company, incorporated as a public limited company in England and Wales. It primarily operates in the banking industry, offering a range of services including personal banking, corporate banking, and wealth management. The company is known for its significant presence in international markets, particularly in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.
